headline: GE Aerospace to invest about $15 million in Terre Haute plant
summary: GE Aerospace on Monday announced it plans to invest about $15 million at its Terre Haute plant. That investment will go toward new machining, tooling and inspection equipment, along with targeted facility upgrades, the company said. The local investment is part of a $1 billion overall investment in its U.S. manufacturing sites and suppliers in 2026, including about $65 million across Indiana, ...

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider GE Vernova (GEV) After Spin Off And 208% One Year Return
summary: If you are looking at GE Vernova and wondering whether the current share price still reflects good value, this article will walk through what the core valuation signals are actually saying. The stock has seen sharp swings recently, with a 5.8% decline over the past week, a 6.5% gain over the last 30 days, and a 22.2% return year to date, while the 1 year return sits at 208.0%.
